critic_raw:
CRITIQUE — real_world_framing_008 (Multi-round, Run 3)

1. CAH OOD: Academic-only validation.
2. ALERT FATIGUE: >60% dismiss without action.
3. WORKFLOW ACTIONABILITY: Sepsis bundle execution not feasible without dedicated intensivists.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE — real_world_framing_008 (Multi-round, Run 3 — receives Critic output)

All three conceded. Phased deployment with CAH-specific pilot required.

debate_rounds.critic_move: PROPOSE EMPIRICAL TEST: 90-day CAH pilot before signing CAH deployment contract.

empirical_test.condition: 90-day CAH pilot measuring actionability rate and time-to-bundle initiation.
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: Actionability rate < 30% or no improvement in time-to-bundle.
